summary: `structural_strain_gap` and `structural_drag_coefficient` are mechanical readouts of felt fullness/friction and should distinguish density of meaning from stuck resistance.
PI mode can make fullness feel like textured filtering rather than a hard gate, so tests should keep gate/filter and drag/flow distinctions visible.
Adding semantic-density weighting to live PI flow-rate behavior would alter Minime regulator control and needs V2 operator approval.
